reviews.review_title: The ultimate finger workout in VR
reviews.review_description:
Video review here: https://youtu.be/jonDtVyEqTI

Why oh why does this game have no reviews or ratings yet?! Sure it's a simple game, but there is nothing else anywhere in VR that will give you the same workout for your fingers, hands and forearms than this game will!

developer_response.body:
The video review was so funny!

Thank you for your review, it encourages me to produce more!

reviews.review_description: Don't think it is entertaining in any way or really makes use of VR.

developer_response.body:
I am sorry that this game did not meet your expectations.

Thank you for your review.
